repository.description: K3s cluster setup on Raspberry Pi 4 + ClusterHAT with Pi Zero 2W nodes

commit.message:
fix(monitoring): remove duplicate namespace.yaml from prometheus and grafana

Both ArgoCD Applications pointed to the same monitoring Namespace resource,
causing a SharedResourceWarning and both apps flipping OutOfSync as they
fought over ownership. CreateNamespace=true on each Application handles
namespace creation without either app tracking it as a managed resource.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(prometheus): remove invalid retention field from config; add securityContext

- retention is a CLI flag (--storage.tsdb.retention.time), not a prometheus.yml
  global field — was causing 'field retention not found in type config.plain'
- Add securityContext fsGroup/runAsUser 65534 (nobody) so Longhorn volume is
  chowned correctly on mount, consistent with the Grafana fix

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(grafana): add securityContext fsGroup 472 for Longhorn volume permissions

Grafana runs as uid 472. Without fsGroup the Longhorn-provisioned PVC is owned
by root and the container fails with 'GF_PATHS_DATA is not writable'.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
docs: add missing bootstrap step guides 04-07

Add bootstrap/docs/04-metallb.md  — MetalLB install + manual kubectl apply of
  IPAddressPool/L2Advertisement (helmfile only installs the controller, not the pool CRDs)
Add bootstrap/docs/05-traefik.md  — Traefik install + /etc/hosts setup
Add bootstrap/docs/06-longhorn.md — Longhorn install + open-iscsi prereq + CSI quirks
Add bootstrap/docs/07-argocd.md   — ArgoCD bootstrap sequence:
  helmfile sync → apply ingress → apply root-application
  Documents server.insecure:true requirement for Traefik reverse-proxy setup

Fix cluster/argocd/addons/docs/metallb.md — previously implied helmfile applied
  the IPAddressPool/L2Advertisement; corrected to show they are separate kubectl applies

merge commits still display the hollow circle (○). Applies to both
terminal unicode and SVG output.

docs(copilot): require upstream chart value verification before editing values.yaml

- Add 'Helm Values Workflow' section with mandatory steps:
  verify key names from upstream chart before writing any values.yaml
- Update documentation requirements table to call out the same rule
- Add rule to always pin --version on helm upgrade to avoid accidental chart jumps

Prompted by a silent-failure incident where csi.attacher.replicas and
ui.enabled were ignored because the correct keys are
csi.attacherReplicaCount and longhornUI.replicas.

commit.message:
Add map feature and update styles and README

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix(longhorn): correct Helm values keys for CSI replicas and UI

Use correct chart value keys:
- csi.attacherReplicaCount/provisionerReplicaCount/resizerReplicaCount/snapshotterReplicaCount (was csi.{name}.replicas — invalid)
- longhornUI.replicas: 1 (was ui.enabled: false — wrong key, and UI is now desired)

Previous keys were silently ignored, leaving defaults (3 CSI replicas, 2 UI pods).
Applied with --version 1.7.2 to avoid accidental chart upgrade.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix .gitignore: exclude binaries and generated files

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add data-driven tutorial system

Tutorials are stored in workloads.json (not hardcoded), making them
user-editable and extensible.

Data model:
- Add 'tutorial' field (Option<String>) to Workload struct
- Add Tutorial struct and 'tutorials' vec to WorkloadRegistry
- Both use #[serde(default)] for backward compat with existing files

Content (11 tutorials total):
- General: Leader Key, Getting Started
- Per-workload: LSP, DAP, TreeView, Tabs, Telescope, Treesitter,
  OmniSharp (C#), Node (TS/JS), Python

CLI: pnm tutorial [topic]
- No args lists all topics
- Supports workload aliases (e.g. pnm tutorial py)

TUI:
- 't' on instance list opens tutorial browser
- 't' on edit features shows tutorial for highlighted workload
- Scrollable tutorial viewer (j/k, d/u, g/G)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: move footer to landing page only

Add README and ARCHITECTURE docs

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

refactor: fix duplicate key bug and modularize shared code

- Fix duplicate React key error in HeroAnimation by adding stable
  element ID tracking (ids[]) to SortStep. Merge sort and insertion
  sort create temporary duplicate values in intermediate array states,
  which caused the valueToId map to return the same key for two
  positions. Each sorting algorithm now maintains a parallel ids array
  that tracks element identity through swaps, shifts, and copies.

- Extract shared color palette into app/lib/colors.ts, replacing 5
  independent color constant declarations across components.

- Extract generateArray and barColor into app/lib/sortingUtils.ts,
  removing duplicates from HeroAnimation and SortingVisualizer.

- Remove the fragile valueToId ref pattern from both HeroAnimation
  and SortingVisualizer in favor of step.ids[pos].

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
[Provisioning Generator] Fix known type resolution in array/dict elements (#57348)

* Fix provisioning generator to resolve known types in array/dict elements

GetUnwrappedCSharpType was calling base.CreateCSharpTypeCore directly,
bypassing KnownProvisioningTypes. This caused SubResource inside
BicepList<> to resolve to Azure.ResourceManager.Resources.Models.SubResource
instead of Azure.Provisioning.Resources.SubResource.

Check KnownProvisioningTypes first for both model and enum types in
GetUnwrappedCSharpType, matching the behavior in CreateCSharpTypeCore.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add SubResource test case to provisioning test project

Add a linkedResources property (SubResource[] via @@alternateType) to
ConfigurationStoreProperties to verify that known types inside
BicepList<> resolve to Azure.Provisioning.Resources.SubResource.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* regen

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
feat: enhance user management, testing, and issue creation skills (#43)

* feat(colima): add script to manage Colima with resource limits

* create colima.sh for starting and stopping Colima
* set default profile, CPU, and memory limits
* provide usage instructions for the script

* docs: add skills for commit messages, PRs, issues, and tests (#33)

* docs: add skills for commit messages, PRs, issues, and tests

- add commit-message skill for strict commit message generation
- add agent-skill-test skill for agent skill validation
- add issue-draft skill for interactive GitHub issue creation
- add pr-description skill for PR description generation
- add xunit-tests skill for xUnit + FluentAssertions test generation

* docs: update copilot instructions and skills

- update copilot-instructions.md for architecture and commit rules
- revise commit-message skill for staged-files debug section
- revise issue-draft skill for interactive issue creation

* feat(tests): add unit tests and improve testing guidelines

* add ApplicationDbContextTests for identity table name configuration
* create ApplicationRoleTests and ApplicationUserTests for entity creation
* introduce create-tests skill for unit test suggestions
* update copilot instructions with C# conventions
* add FluentAssertions and Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore.InMemory packages

* feat(database): implement database migrator and initializer

* add IDatabaseMigrator interface for migration abstraction
* create EfCoreDatabaseMigrator for EF Core implementation
* update DatabaseInitializer to use IDatabaseMigrator
* add unit tests for DatabaseInitializer and EfCoreDatabaseMigrator
* remove unused coverage.runsettings files
* add new coverage.runsettings for application and domain tests

* chore(dependencies): update package references to latest versions

* upgraded Microsoft.CodeAnalysis.NetAnalyzers to 10.0.103
* upgraded Microsoft.AspNetCore.Identity and related packages to 10.0.3
* upgraded Microsoft.EntityFrameworkCore packages to 10.0.3
* upgraded coverlet.collector to 8.0.0
* upgraded Microsoft.NET.Test.Sdk to 18.3.0
* upgraded xunit.runner.visualstudio to 3.1.5

* Add new skills and feature specification template (#37)

* feat(skills): add new skills for design, generation, migration, and refactoring

- create design skill for generating PlantUML diagrams
- implement generate skill for creating C# files
- add new-migration skill for Entity Framework migrations
- introduce refactor-file skill for enforcing coding guidelines
- update project settings for auto-approving dotnet ef commands
- add registration process documentation with UML diagrams
- update test projects to include FluentAssertions
- remove obsolete ApplicationDbContextTests

* feat(issue-template): add feature specification template

* create a new feature specification template for GitHub issues
* includes sections for title, overview, business requirements, functional requirements, and open questions
* enhances user experience for proposing new features

* ci(workflow): specify exact .NET Core SDK version

* fix(docs): correct typos and improve clarity in documentation

* fixed typos in login, registration, and create-user documents
* improved phrasing for better understanding
* ensured consistency in language throughout the documentation

* ci(workflow): update setup-dotnet action to v5

* ci(workflow): downgrade setup-dotnet action and update version
* change setup-dotnet action from v5 to v4
* update dotnet version to '10.0.x'

* chore: update feature and issue skills (#39)

* chore(issue-template): update feature specification template

- rename sections for clarity
- remove outdated business and functional requirements
- add clear overview and specs sections
- create new skill for generating specs issues

* feat(skills): add implement skill for automating issue handling

- introduces a new skill to automate GitHub issue implementation
- includes detailed purpose, workflow, guidelines, and invocation instructions
- ensures adherence to Beagl coding standards and best practices

* chore(webapp): update project structure to razor pages

* rename blazor to razor pages in configuration
* update changelog and readme for project changes
* remove blazor components and replace with razor pages
* add error and not found pages with corresponding models
* update program.cs to use razor pages
* clean up unused styles and scripts

* feat(webapp): deliver localized users workspace and blazor shell

- add user management flow across domain/application/infrastructure layers
- implement result-based service contracts and identity repository integration
- build users UI with modal CRUD panels, localized validation, and icon row actions
- introduce concern-based en/fr resources and backend error-code localization mapping
- migrate pages to blazor routes and remove legacy razor pages wiring/files
- apply branded design tokens, logo integration, and updated CRUD interaction guidelines
- add application and webapp tests for user management behaviors and users page

* feat(users): add server-side pagination and global metrics

- add GetUsersPageQuery and UsersPage domain records for paginated queries
- add UsersMetrics domain record for filter-independent metric counts
- replace IUserRepository.GetAllAsync with GetPageAsync and GetMetricsAsync
- replace IUserManagementService.GetUsersAsync with GetUsersPageAsync and GetUsersMetricsAsync
- implement EF Core Skip/Take with ILike filter and CountAsync in IdentityUserRepository
- implement three independent CountAsync queries for total, pending confirmation, and locked out
- wire Users page to server-side pagination with previous/next controls and summary
- load global metrics separately from paged data; refresh on create, update, delete
- rename metric card Users.Metric.Confirmed to Users.Metric.PendingConfirmation
- add EN/FR localization keys for pagination controls and updated metric label
- add responsive .users-pagination CSS block
- document server-side pagination guideline in copilot-instructions.md
- update FakeUserManagementService in tests to new service interface

* feat(webapp): add role model and assignment to user management

- add UserRole enum (Citizen, Employee, Administrator) to domain
- propagate role through application DTOs and service validation rules
- require email for Employee/Administrator; require phone for all roles
- seed Identity roles at startup via DatabaseInitializer
- assign and replace Identity role on create/update in repository
- surface role in users page: list column, create/edit dropdowns, details view
- add EN/FR localization keys for roles and validation error codes
- update unit tests across application, infrastructure, and webapp layers

* feat(users): enhance user detail panel structure and localization

* implement grouped section pattern for user details
* add localization keys for new sections in resource files
* update css for detail panel styling

* chore(instructions): consolidate and update coding guidelines

* restructure copilot instructions for clarity and stability
* introduce scoped instruction files for architecture, async, error handling, and more
* enhance skill documentation with relevant instruction file references
* ensure all guidelines align with clean architecture and best practices

* test(tests): expand unit coverage and tighten testing guidance

- add broad unit coverage for user management service guards, validation, mapping, and token forwarding
- add domain result tests including generic failure default-value behavior
- add infrastructure database initializer tests for null role manager, role paths, and token forwarding
- remove webapp users page bunit tests
- update instruction files to enforce testable design, same-change unit tests, and no automatic integration tests

* test(tests): add infrastructure repository and migrator coverage

- add identity repository tests for create/update error mapping and role replacement branches
- add migrator relational positive-path test with EF warning suppression for pending model changes
- add EF Core SQLite provider package to support relational migrator test harness

* test(tests): add coverage for identity repository query paths

- add in-memory ef core dependency for infrastructure test project
- add query-focused tests for GetMetricsAsync, GetPageAsync, and GetByIdAsync
- add update failure/not-found tests for IdentityUserRepository.UpdateAsync
- add delete success/failure/not-found tests for IdentityUserRepository.DeleteAsync

* test(tests): add coverage tests and exclude generated migration code

- add application tests for user management email validation and logger event ids
- add FakeLogger test utility to assert structured logging calls
- add domain tests for invalid Result constructor states
- extend infrastructure query tests for null-field and lockout mapping behavior
- add infrastructure repository coverage tests for GetPageAsync and role mapping
- update all test coverage runsettings to exclude generated files by file and attribute
- mark migration files as generated in editorconfig and add migration coverage exclusion partials

* chore(pr-description): update skill for generating PR content

- modify description to clarify usage for unmerged commits
- enhance input behavior for determining base branch
- restructure output format for clarity and consistency
- add sections for commit overview, architectural impact, and testing

* chore(vscode): add git merge-base to autoApprove settings

* include git merge-base in terminal autoApprove configuration

* chore(pr-description): update skill to include GitHub CLI integration

* enhance description for clarity on PR generation
* add optional steps for creating PR on GitHub using `gh` CLI
* provide instructions for users without `gh` CLI installed

* chore(pr-description): update skill for generating copyable PR content

* modify description to clarify output format
* enhance purpose section for better understanding
* adjust output format rules for markdown blocks

* fix(users): trim userId before deletion and logging
* ensure userId is trimmed to prevent errors
* improve logging consistency by using trimmed value

* Update README.md

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* feat(users): enhance identity user repository with role mapping

* add applicationDbContext to IdentityUserRepository

commit.message:
Enable client init spector tests (#57332)

* Re-enable client-initialization Spector tests

The paramAlias feature has landed in TypeSpec (microsoft/typespec#9774),
so the client-initialization default, individually, and individuallyParent
Spector specs no longer need to be excluded.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add client-initialization Spector test classes and project references

Restore the DefaultClientTests and IndividuallyClientTests that were
removed in 35c66d8aeb6. Updated for the new generated code:
- ParamAliasClient now takes a single blobName parameter (paramAlias works)
- Removed [Ignore] on IndividuallyNestedWithParamAlias test
- individuallyParent has no generated source, so no tests added for it

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Add IndividuallyParent test stubs with [Ignore] for issue 9775

The generator doesn't yet produce source code for the
InitializedBy.individually | InitializedBy.parent pattern.
Tests are placeholder stubs ignored until the generator supports this.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix ClientSettingsVisitor recursion and remove [Ignore] from IndividuallyParent tests

Add a _visitedClients guard in ClientSettingsVisitor.Visit to prevent
infinite recursion when parent/child clients trigger CreateClient cycles
via GetRootClient/GetSubClients during constructor building.

Remove [Ignore] from IndividuallyParentClientTests now that issue 9775
is fixed.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix ClientSettingsVisitor recursion, implement IndividuallyParent tests

Track visited InputClient instances (not ClientProvider) to prevent
infinite recursion when parent/child clients trigger CreateClient
cycles via GetRootClient/GetSubClients during constructor building.

Generate the individuallyParent spec (now succeeds with the fix),
implement full test bodies matching the original tests from 35c66d8,
updated for current generated API signatures:
- Parent factory methods now take initialization parameters
- ParamAlias clients take single blobName parameter
Add project reference to Spector.Tests.csproj.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix SpectorTestAttribute path resolution for mixed-case directories

The individuallyParent spec uses kebab-case parent directories
(client-generator-core/client-initialization) with a camelCase leaf
(individuallyParent). SpectorTestAttribute tried all-kebab then
all-camelCase, neither matching the mixed path.

Add GetGeneratedDirectoryMixed that resolves each path segment
independently: try kebab-case first, fall back to camelCase per
segment. Also add a Directory.Exists guard before GetClientCsFile
to prevent DirectoryNotFoundException.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Exclude individuallyParent from generation, keep tests for when base generator bug is fixed

The non-stub generation of individuallyParent produces factory methods
with wrong constructor arguments (base generator bug in sub-client
factory method emission). Add to failingSpecs until the base generator
is fixed. Tests remain and will auto-skip via SpectorTestAttribute
since the library stays stubbed.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix DistributedTracingVisitor and ClientSettingsVisitor for sub-client factory methods

Two Azure generator bugs prevented individuallyParent from building:

1. DistributedTracingVisitor: TryUpdateSubClientFactoryMethodReturnStatement
   only handled the Volatile.Read/Interlocked.CompareExchange caching
   pattern. Sub-clients with InitializedBy.parent use simple return
   statements (return new T(...)). Add handling for direct
   NewInstanceExpression returns to prepend ClientDiagnostics.

2. ClientSettingsVisitor: Moved constructor updates from Visit to
   VisitConstructor to avoid the CreateClient recursion cycle entirely.
   The Visit method triggered .Constructors access which caused
   parent/child CreateClient cycles. VisitConstructor runs per-constructor
   without triggering lazy evaluation of sub-clients.

Remove individuallyParent from failingSpecs - it now generates and
builds correctly.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix ClientSettingsVisitor: use in-progress guard instead of VisitConstructor

Revert to the Visit + UpdateClientConstructors approach (needed because
VisitConstructor is only called when base.Visit processes constructors,
which this override doesn't do). Use _inProgressClients HashSet<InputClient>
to prevent re-entrant recursion when .Constructors access triggers
CreateClient cycles for parent/child hierarchies. The guard allows the
first caller to complete the update after recursion unwinds.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix ClientSettingsVisitor: remove client from guard set after update completes

The _inProgressClients guard prevented infinite recursion but also
prevented subsequent visits for the same InputClient from being
processed. When CreateClient creates a new ClientProvider instance
during re-entrant calls, that instance needs its constructors updated
too. Remove the InputClient from the guard set after the update
completes so later visits are processed normally.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix IndividuallyParent test values to match mockapi expectations

Path test: use 'test-blob' (not 'test-resource'), expect size=1024,
contentType='application/octet-stream', createdOn=2023-01-01.
Query test: same value corrections.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Regenerate individuallyParent as stubs (revert accidental non-stub commit)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* regen

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Remove role=note from footnote list items to fix list structure

role="note" on <li> overrides the implicit "listitem" role, breaking
the ol > li list structure that screen readers expect. The footnotes
section with aria-label="Footnotes" provides sufficient context.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message: Add image dimensions to prevent CLS from unsized images Post-build script (script/inject-image-size) reads local image files from dist-astro/ and injects width/height attributes into tags that are missing them. This prevents Cumulative Layout Shift from legacy blog post images that use raw HTML tags. Results: 7 local images across 2 pages now have explicit dimensions. The remaining 31 unsized images are external (GitHub, xkcd, etc.) and are handled by CSS max-width/height:auto on .post-content img. Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Replace deprecated DPUB-ARIA roles with standard ARIA

Replace doc-endnotes, doc-endnote, doc-backlink, and doc-noteref roles
(flagged as deprecated by axe-core) with standard ARIA:
- Footnotes section: aria-label="Footnotes" (no custom role)
- Footnote items: role="note" (standard ARIA role)
- Back-references and note refs: no custom role (semantic HTML sufficient)

commit.message:
Initial commit: PCSX2 launcher, keyboard input, RL scaffolding

- main.py: launches PCSX2 with -nogui -batch, loads savestates/rocm-racer-nfsu2-highway.p2s
- memory_readers/keyboard_controller.py: rootless xdotool-based keypress injection
  targeting PCSX2 window by PID; used for test loop (K = Cross/accelerate)
- memory_readers/virtual_gamepad.py: uinput DualShock2 virtual gamepad with full
  SDL3 game controller mapping (reserved for analog RL agent)
- memory_readers/nfsu2_memory.py: /proc/pid/mem telemetry reader scaffold (offsets TBD)
- environments/pcsx2_env.py: Gymnasium wrapper scaffold with PPO-ready reward function
- agents/ppo_agent.py, sac_agent.py: placeholder stubs
- docs/: summary, telemetry memory map, SDL3 controller integration research,
  implementation notes for human setup steps
- memcards/rocm-racer.ps2: pre-built PCSX2 memory card with 100% NFSU2 save
- savestates/rocm-racer-nfsu2-highway.p2s: highway loop training anchor save state
- requirements.txt: Python dependencies (PyTorch ROCm must be installed manually)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix empty link text for Twitter handle in MDX post

The @ symbol in [@randw] was consumed by MDX as a JSX expression,
resulting in empty link text. Remove the @ to produce accessible
'randw on Twitter' link text.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Reduce font downloads from 8 files to 3

Drop italic styles (browser synthesizes from normal weights; only used
in blockquotes/prose) and weight 500/medium (close to 400; browser
auto-selects nearest available weight).

Remaining: Inter 400, 600, 700 normal (~71 KiB total, down from ~195 KiB).
Shortens the critical request chain by eliminating 5 font downloads.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Reduce forced reflows in tooltip and navigation scripts

Tldr.astro: Read target.getBoundingClientRect() before appending the
tooltip to the DOM. Append with visibility:hidden to measure tooltip
dimensions, then position and reveal — avoids the append→read cycle
that forces a synchronous layout recalculation.

Navigation.astro: Batch classList operations using multi-argument
add()/remove() instead of 8 individual toggle() calls per link,
reducing style recalculation triggers during View Transitions.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Allow data: URIs in script-src CSP for Astro ClientRouter

Astro's View Transitions (ClientRouter) injects a no-op module script
with src="data:application/javascript," to trigger module re-evaluation
after navigation. Add data: to script-src to prevent CSP violations.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Improve Cloudflare caching and security headers

_headers:
- HTML pages: max-age=120 with stale-while-revalidate=86400 instead of
  max-age=0, must-revalidate. Eliminates network round-trips during a
  browsing session while background revalidation keeps content fresh.
  Worst case after deploy: 2 min stale window.
- Pagefind search index: max-age=300 (stable within a session)
- Feeds/sitemaps/llms.txt: add stale-while-revalidate=86400
- Remove deprecated X-XSS-Protection header (no browser uses it; CSP
  provides the actual protection)

wrangler.json:
- Remove nodejs_compat flag (unnecessary for static asset serving)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Replace unused preconnects with dns-prefetch

Downgrade preconnect hints for images.amazon.com and
user-images.githubusercontent.com to dns-prefetch. These origins are
only used on some pages, so preconnect wastes bandwidth opening full
TCP+TLS connections on pages that never fetch from them. dns-prefetch
is nearly free when unused but still saves DNS lookup time when needed.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: benbalter.github.com

commit.message:
Reduce critical request chain latency

- Remove font preloading: With font-display: optional, fonts aren't
  render-critical. Eliminating 8 font preload links from <head> frees
  bandwidth for critical JS resources.

- Promote modulepreload hints to top of <head>: Inject shared chunk
  modulepreload links right after <meta charset> instead of before
  </head>, so the browser discovers dependencies during initial HTML
  parsing rather than after script evaluation.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: use bare date tag pattern for changelog tag discovery

Current published tags use bare YYYYMMDD format. Pass tag-pattern
override so discover_tags matches existing tags rather than waiting
for future gnome-YYYYMMDD tagged builds.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

repository.name: tunaOS
repository.description: Bringing a modern cloud-native experience to the Enterprise Linux Desktop

commit.message:
Fix nav link spacing by moving CLS pseudo-element to block context

Move the bold-width-reserving ::after from .nav-link (flex container)
to .nav-item (block-level li). In a flex context, the ::after became a
side-by-side flex item doubling each link's width. On .nav-item the
pseudo-element is in normal block flow where height:0 collapses it
while its intrinsic width still reserves space for the bold state.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Apply suggestion from @Copilot

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Apply suggestion from @Copilot

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Accessible View: include file paths for inline references in chat responses (#301565)

* Initial plan

* Add inline reference handling with file paths to Accessible View

When the Accessible View renders chat responses, inline file references
(kind: 'inlineReference') were previously skipped entirely. This adds
handling to include the file name and full path (and line number for
locations) so screen reader users get the same context as the visual UI.

- Handle URI references: show "name (path)"
- Handle Location references: show "name (path:line)"
- Handle workspace symbol references: show "name (path:line)"
- Add 3 new tests verifying inline reference rendering

Co-authored-by: meganrogge <29464607+meganrogge@users.noreply.github.com>

* Revert unintended monaco.d.ts changes from gulp compile

Co-authored-by: meganrogge <29464607+meganrogge@users.noreply.github.com>

* Rename ambiguous variable in test (location -> fileLocation)

docs: add public-header documentation for include/temporal/ and include/themis/

Add 5 documentation files each for include/temporal/ and include/themis/:

include/temporal/ (v1.6.0, 2026-03-20):
- ARCHITECTURE.md — overview, design principles, interface inventory table
  for all 13 temporal headers, component interaction diagram
- AUDIT.md — 2026-03-22 audit pass; 2 minor findings (CDC overflow semantics,
  RetentionRule equality operators)
- CHANGELOG.md — Keep-a-Changelog format from v1.0.0 to v1.6.0
- ROADMAP.md — completed items, planned features (v1.6.1–v1.9.0),
  6-phase implementation plan, production readiness checklist
- SECURITY.md — threat model table (9 threats), security controls,
  known limitations

include/themis/ (v1.7.0, 2026-03-12):
- ARCHITECTURE.md — overview, design principles, interface inventory table
  for 8 top-level headers + 3 subdirectories, dependency graph
- AUDIT.md — 2026-03-22 audit pass; 1 minor finding (GateResult denial reason)
- CHANGELOG.md — Keep-a-Changelog format from v1.0.0 to v1.7.0
- ROADMAP.md — completed items, planned features (v1.7.1–v2.0.0),
  6-phase implementation plan, production readiness checklist
- SECURITY.md — threat model table (9 threats), fail-closed controls,
  known limitations

All files start with validated status header and cross-reference
../../src/<module>/ for implementation details.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Remove duplicate info strip below map in MapView, update copilot instructions with deployment workflow

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Improve CLS for navigation, post content, and font loading

- KeepReading: apply initial hidden state (opacity:0, translateY) via CSS
  at render time instead of JS rAF after paint (fixes 0.307 + cascading shifts)
- Navigation: add invisible bold pseudo-element on nav links to reserve
  width for font-semibold active state (fixes 0.11 CLS)
- Fonts: set font-display: optional for Inter to prevent FOUT shift (fixes 0.145)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
